creator: jpenman.smithson@gmail.com
text:
I'm not sure how fontconfig determines which font to use if there are multiple types, these threads suggest it isn't deterministic:

https://lists.freedesktop.org/archives/fontconfig/2008-July/002985.html
https://www.tug.org/pipermail/tex-live/2012-April/031414.html

So I'll update it to just include the OTF fonts and get rid of the options.
